overview: A feature-rich 2D CAD web application with precision drawing tools, layer management, snapping, measurement, and enhanced file import/export supporting DXF, SVG, DWG, and PDF formats.
features: 2D drawing tools (line, rectangle, circle, arc, polyline, ellipse, octagon)
Layer management with visibility and color control
DWG file import with automatic layer creation matching source file
DWG file export with exact color preservation
PDF import as traceable background image
DXF import with layer and color extraction
Measurement tool with unit support (pixels, inches, cm)
Object properties panel (position, size, rotation, color, fill)
